Hey, what's going on everyone? Welcome to the Lead Nurture portion. So let's rock and roll. Lead Nurture is everything that happens between the opt-in and the show-up. So everything from the time we get the name from the advertisement to actually getting that person to walk through the door. Or if we're doing phone sales, get them actually on the phone. So piece of the process. First is to get them to schedule. Some of this is already accomplished with the online scheduler. So that takes a lot of the work out, believe it or not, in the beginning for the first four years I did this, I didn't have my line schedule. So we had to manually reach out to everyone to get them to schedule. But that was to get them to pick up first and then get them to pick a time. And that's for somebody who opted in and then did not schedule on the thank you page. Or get them to pick up and confirm the time. So if they did pick a time on the online scheduler, we still need to treat them as though they're not going to show up. Because I'm telling you, they will not. Unless they confirm the time and they have built a little bit of rapport and they have a desire to show up. Otherwise, it's somebody who clicked twice with their thumb while they were on the toilet and has very low likelihood of actually appearing. So you need to treat same except with the people who have not scheduled. You have to also get a time. Whereas with the people who have scheduled. We're just confirming that time and getting them excited about showing up. So for this process, I'll be going over the calling and texting sequence, the phone script and the text scripts that we use throughout the process. The second objective is to get them to show. So once we have them scheduled, we have them with a time that's confirmed, we want to increase likely to the show up. And so we'll be showing you the reminder sequence that we use that we've tested that has to get prospects to show. The third thing we're going to do is after we have skim the cream off the top. So to say the last thing we do is we run all of the leads back through the machine one more time. And I do this on a periodic basis, usually every like 14 days or so, we will run a last push just saying, hey, like must have missed you. Maybe you life got in the way. You know, when do you like just shoot me a message if you want. And I'll show you the sequence says, but essentially just like a scarcity play at the end prior to them, you know, so that we can get their attention again, and hopefully one last go at getting them. And I will tell you that last, the leaner trophy.
